John 3:1-36

16  “For God loved the world so much that he gave his only-begotten Son, so that everyone exercising faith in him might not be destroyed but have everlasting life. 17  For God did not send his Son into the world for him to judge the world, but for the world to be saved through him. (second segment of verse 17)

John 3:16

  • loved: The first occurrence of the Greek verb a·ga·paʹo in John. See Joh 1:29 and the study note on Joh 1:10.

  • everlasting life: A promise based on faith.

Marginal References

  • Ge 22:2, 16; Joh 1:14; Ro 5:8; 1Jo 4:9, 10

Media

  • Jesus explains birth from water and spirit (gnj 3 00:00-04:43)

Research Guide

  • Research Guide
    “God So Loved the World”, The Watchtower, 7/1/2014
  • Research Guide
    Insight, Volume 2, page 274

John 3:17

  • Joh 12:47; 1Jo 4:14
